hero.title: Mykhailo Miahkyi
hero.subtitle: Researcher, educator, and technology professional
hero.description: This site brings together my scientific work, teaching path, and professional experience in one bilingual portfolio.

profile.summary: I work at the intersection of research, teaching, and professional practice, with a focus on turning complex ideas into useful systems and understandable learning experiences.
